textByHashes.778c3f3c5668dcd9b95340d404bdbc89fa2fb542: Good day sir. I'm the quartermaster for this camp. We have a little we could trade here.
textByHashes.52f078f66039a14ba284c342d7fb995010e66814: Good day miss. I'm the quartermaster for this camp. We have a little we could trade here.
textByHashes.d648f03470623dd0f3593becf1fe963fd11cd67a: We should be getting a new stock soon. Would you like a look at what we do have?
textByHashes.14bc428679e8de09035a9bc94da7f2e68e3085b8: We have a new stock of dragon halberds. Would you like a look at what we have?
